params.SpellDescription: Add two mana in any combination of colors. Spend this mana only to cast creature spells.

remaining_params.SpellDescription: Add two mana in any combination of colors. Spend this mana only to cast creature spells.

params.SpellDescription: Each player's life total becomes the number of creatures they control. Activate only if creatures you control have total power 8 or greater.

remaining_params.SpellDescription: Each player's life total becomes the number of creatures they control. Activate only if creatures you control have total power 8 or greater.
